verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The urgency of the hour is upon me Rapturing faith I must attain For me to live is Christ For me to die is gain A body change is ordained for me It’s incredible but it's true I’m making ready for a paradox, What about you?

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: People wonder why am I strange They look at the way that I behave There was a time I was lost and undone God came to me and He showed me I’m His son Showed me this world is passing away Soon cometh the great earthquake The only escape is a body change The only escape is a body change

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Like Noah here I stand Under preparation by God’s command With my eyes are fixed on the prize Pressing towards the mark, I won't compromise I'll rise up and finish the job Moving from faith to perfect love Above the judgement I'll be taken up Above the judgement I'll be taken up

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: The urgency of the hour is upon me Rapturing faith I must attain For me to live is Christ For me to die is gain A body change is ordained for me It’s incredible but it's true I’m making ready for a paradox, What about you? I’m making ready for a paradox, What about you?
